series_metadata.series_description: Documents contained in outdated or replaced databases, applications, software, or other programs that are no longer created or maintained by the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Unknown: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Unknown: Trash ; Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
